title: Portfolio Website
description: A modern, data-driven React portfolio with polished navigation, interactive backgrounds, reusable components, and recruiter-focused content architecture.
details: Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router, and ReactBits-inspired visual components.
Implemented interactive Galaxy background, collapsible navigation, responsive pages, and JSON-driven content.
Designed dedicated pages for About, Contact & CV, Extracurricular Activities, and future project/internship expansion.
mediaNote: Space reserved for a homepage walkthrough video.

title: Online Food Ordering Backend System
description: A Node.js backend for an online food ordering and e-commerce application developed during the Foodics backend internship.
details: Developed RESTful APIs with role-based authentication for users and admins.
Integrated PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM to manage users, products, carts, and orders.
Implemented cart-to-order lifecycle, asynchronous backend logic, Jest unit tests, Docker setup, and Postman API validation.
mediaNote: Backend architecture/demo video can be added later.

title: Travel Web Application
description: A full-stack travel website where users can browse destinations, create accounts, search places, and manage a want-to-go list.
details: Built a client-server full-stack web application using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, EJS, JavaScript, and HTML.
Implemented authentication, sessions, secure routing, and access control.
Designed MongoDB CRUD operations, duplicate validation, destination pages, want-to-go lists, and substring-based search.
mediaNote: Future slot for a user-flow demo.

title: HR Management System
description: A full-stack HR management web application for payroll, attendance, leave approvals, and role-based administration.
details: Developed with ASP.NET and SQL Server using Admin, HR, and Employee access roles.
Designed relational database procedures, functions, and views for payroll, attendance, deductions, leave workflows, and approvals.
Implemented authentication, automated payroll calculations, performance tracking, and frontend-backend validation.
mediaNote: Reserved for dashboard screenshots or walkthrough video.

title: Operating System Simulator
description: A C-based simulation of monolithic operating system concepts with process scheduling, memory management, disk swapping, and resource mutexes.
details: Built a custom text-based program interpreter for OS course workflows.
Implemented memory management with disk swapping and synchronized resource access.
Compared multiple process scheduling algorithms and simulated core OS behavior.
mediaNote: Terminal/demo recording can be embedded later.

title: Computer Architecture Processor
description: A C-based simulation of a pipelined Harvard Architecture processor for the Computer Systems Architecture course at GUC.
details: Implemented a custom 16-bit instruction set architecture.
Built a 3-stage instruction pipeline with hazard handling.
Simulated processor behavior for the Double McHarvard package specification.

title: Enhance
description: A personal gym, macro, and entertainment app concept from GitHub.
details: Created as a personal product experiment combining fitness and entertainment flows.
Structured as an app idea for tracking gym routines, macros, and user lifestyle preferences.
More implementation details and screenshots can be added later.

title: Database 2 Milestone Project
description: A Java database coursework milestone project from GitHub.
details: Built as part of database coursework at GUC.
Uses Java to practice backend/database concepts and milestone-based delivery.
More project details can be expanded when final documentation is added.
